1007 DLYS_14_CD DLYS_14_CD O0110J1B Other: Dialysis (14 days) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received dialysis while a resident of the facility and within the last 14 days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
1008 DLYS_DSCHRG_CD DLYS_DSCHRG_CD O0110J1C Other: Dialysis (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received dialysis in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective
